commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
Clement Of Rome
commentaries.content: In very deed a seed honourable and holy, and "a priestly kingdom, a holy people, the people of the inheritance"

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: But you are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people for his own; that you should show forth the praises of him who has called you out of darkness into his marvelous light: You are a purchased people, whom Christ purchased, bought and redeemed with the price of his precious blood. That you may declare his virtues; i. the excellencies and perfections of God, who hath called you, and now made you his people, which you were not, at least in this matter before, neither you that were Jews, nor especially you that were Gentiles.

commentaries.author: Ignatius of Antioch
commentaries.content: Blessed, then, are ye who are God-bearers, spirit-bearers, temple-bearers, bearers of holiness, adorned in all respects with the commandments of Jesus Christ, being "a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a peculiar people"

commentaries.author: Justin Martyr
commentaries.content: Being vehemently inflamed by the word of His calling, we are the true high priestly race of God, as even God Himself bears witness, saying that in every place among the Gentiles sacrifices are presented to Him well-pleasing and pure. Now God receives sacrifices from no one, except through His priests.

commentaries.author: Methodius of Olympus
commentaries.content: Hail, thou people of the Lord, thou chosen generation, thou royal priesthood, thou holy nation, thou peculiar people-show forth His praises who hath called you out of darkness into His marvellous light; and for His mercies glorify Him.

commentaries.author: The Apostolic Constitutions
commentaries.content:
You, therefore, are the holy and sacred "Church of God, enrolled in heaven, a royal priesthood, an holy nation, a peculiar people".
Let the bishop pray for the people, and say: "Save Thy people, O Lord, and bless Thine inheritance, which Thou hast obtained with the precious blood of Thy Christ, and hast called a royal priesthood, and an holy nation.".
For there is no necessity that the women should be seen by the men; but only in the laying on of hands the bishop shall anoint her head, as the priests and kings were formerly anointed, not because those which are now baptized are ordained priests, but as being Christians, or anointed, from Christ the Anointed, "a royal priesthood, and an holy nation, the Church of God, the pillar and ground of the marriage-chamber".
We further offer to Thee for this people, that Thou wilt render them, to the praise of Thy Christ, "a royal priesthood and an holy nation; "

commentaries.author: The Didache
commentaries.content: Every first-fruit, therefore, of the products of wine-press and threshing-floor, of oxen and of sheep, thou shalt take and give to the prophets, for they are your high priests.

commentaries.author: Victorinus of Pettau
commentaries.content: "] That is to say, a Church of all believers; as also the Apostle Peter says: "A holy nation, a royal priesthood."

methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
